name: NudaUI
description: Copy-paste CSS & JS animations that work everywhere. Zero dependencies.

categories.label: Loaders
categories.description: Loading state animations — pulse dots, orbits, ripples, bars, waves. Used while async work is in flight to signal progress without committing to a percentage.

categories.label: Spinners
categories.description: Pure-CSS spinner variants — ring, dual ring, conic, segmented, gradient. Lightweight indeterminate progress for buttons, dialogs, and inline contexts.

categories.label: Progress
categories.description: Determinate progress indicators — linear, radial, segmented, striped, gradient fill. Use when you can express completion as a percentage.

categories.label: Skeletons
categories.description: Skeleton placeholders and shimmer loaders — generic blocks plus domain-specific shapes (message, card, list row, table, comment, feed, article, dashboard). Reserve layout while data loads to kill layout shift and avoid empty white screens.

categories.label: Text Effects
categories.description: Typography-driven animations — scramble, typewriter, letter reveal, gradient sweep, glitch. Hero headlines, on-scroll reveals, marketing copy.

categories.label: Buttons
categories.description: Animated button states — magnetic hover, liquid morph, border beam, ripple, shine. Conversion-focused micro-interactions for CTAs.

categories.label: Toggles & Inputs
categories.description: Switches, checkboxes, radios, OTP fields. Stateful form controls with morphing transitions between on/off and indeterminate states.

categories.label: Cards & Hover
categories.description: Card hover behaviors — 3D tilt, glow, lift, flip, traced borders. Drop-in patterns for product grids, feature cards, link cards.

categories.label: Indicators
categories.description: Status, presence, and signal indicators — pulse dots, live badges, status rings, signal bars. For uptime, online state, real-time data.

categories.label: Micro-interactions
categories.description: Tiny, purposeful animations — like burst, copy-check, pulse badge, shake on error. The small details that make an interface feel responsive.

categories.label: Backgrounds
categories.description: Animated background fills — aurora, mesh gradients, grid pulse, noise grain, gradient flow. Hero backdrops without WebGL or video tags.

categories.label: Borders & Outlines
categories.description: Animated borders and outlines — traced borders, dashed flow, glow rings, gradient beams. Highlight CTAs, focus states, premium tiers.

categories.label: Avatars
categories.description: User avatar treatments — status rings, presence dots, stacked groups, shimmer placeholders. Inline user identity at any size.

categories.label: Badges & Tags
categories.description: Display-only pill labels and status tags — New, Beta, count, gradient, animated pulse. Read-only chips for versioning, feature flags, and taxonomy. For a text input that lets users add/remove their own tags, see Tags & Chips Input.

categories.label: Navigation
categories.description: Top-nav and inline nav patterns — underline slide, pill indicator, animated tabs, dropdown reveal. Pointer-driven navigation primitives.

categories.label: Dropdowns & Menus
categories.description: Dropdown and menu UI — fade/scale/slide menus, context menu, profile menu, split button, mega menu, nested submenu, styled select, checkbox menu, searchable and action menus. Accessible, framework-agnostic open/close patterns.

categories.label: Breadcrumbs
categories.description: Breadcrumb trails — chevron, slash, pill, arrow, collapsed, icon, gradient, numbered-step, underline, and glass styles. Hierarchical navigation that orients users and feeds breadcrumb rich results.

categories.label: Pagination
categories.description: Pagination controls — classic numbered, rounded, minimal pager, dots, load-more, compact with ellipsis, jump-to-page, progress, arrows, and underline. For paging lists, tables, search results, and carousels.

categories.label: Toasts & Alerts
categories.description: Toasts, banners, snackbars, and inline alerts — transient, auto-dismissing system messages that slide in and out. For a persistent inbox of past notifications, see Notification Center.

categories.label: Tooltips
categories.description: Hover and focus tooltips — arrow, fade, slide, glass effect. Contextual help that appears on demand and disappears cleanly.

categories.label: Dividers
categories.description: Animated separators — gradient lines, pulsing dots, drawn waves and zigzags, sparkle. Section breaks with personality.

categories.label: Cursors
categories.description: Custom cursor effects — dot follower, magnetic snap, trail, mix-blend. Pointer-driven enhancements for marketing sites and portfolios.

categories.label: Countdowns
categories.description: Time-bound counters — flip cards, digit roll, rings, segmented displays. For launches, deadlines, sales, and scheduled events.

categories.label: Scroll Effects
categories.description: Scroll-driven animations — fade in, parallax layers, reveal on intersect, top-of-page progress bar. Built on IntersectionObserver and CSS scroll-timeline.

categories.label: 3D Effects
categories.description: 3D transforms in pure CSS — card flip, perspective hover, depth layering, cube. No WebGL, no Three.js — just transform-style: preserve-3d.

categories.label: Modals & Overlays
categories.description: Modal dialogs, overlays, and drawers — scale in, slide, backdrop blur, side drawer. Focus-trapping shells with motion that telegraphs intent.

categories.label: Accordions & Tabs
categories.description: Disclosure widgets — chevron rotate, plus-minus morph, animated tab transitions, stacked accordion. Progressive disclosure done right.

categories.label: Marquees & Tickers
categories.description: Infinite scrolling tickers — linear, pause-on-hover, vertical, gradient-masked edges. Logo clouds, news bars, social proof reels.

categories.label: Empty States
categories.description: Empty state illustrations — empty box, inbox, search, ghost, pulse. The screens users see before there's anything to see, designed to delight.

categories.label: Charts
categories.description: Lightweight CSS-driven charts — bar, line, donut, sparkline, gauge, heatmap, area, pie, KPI. For dashboards that don't justify a charting library.

categories.label: Particles & Effects
categories.description: Decorative particle systems — confetti, sparkles, fireflies, snow, rain, fireworks, bubbles, stars, comet. Celebratory and ambient effects.

categories.label: Glassmorphism
categories.description: Copy-paste UI animations and components.

categories.label: Animated Gradients
categories.description: Copy-paste UI animations and components.

categories.label: Noise & Grain
categories.description: Copy-paste UI animations and components.

categories.label: Scroll-Driven
categories.description: Copy-paste UI animations and components.

categories.label: View Transitions
categories.description: Copy-paste UI animations and components.

categories.label: CSS-Only Interactions
categories.description: Copy-paste UI animations and components.

categories.label: Glitch & Distortion
categories.description: Copy-paste UI animations and components.

categories.label: Neon & Glow
categories.description: Copy-paste UI animations and components.

categories.label: Morphing Shapes
categories.description: Copy-paste UI animations and components.

categories.label: Confetti & Celebration
categories.description: Copy-paste UI animations and components.

categories.label: Animated Icons
categories.description: Copy-paste UI animations and components.

categories.label: Weather & Ambient
categories.description: Copy-paste UI animations and components.

categories.label: Stats & Counters
categories.description: Stat blocks and counters — count up, trend cards, score rings, streak displays, achievement unlocks. Numbers worth animating.

categories.label: Form States
categories.description: Form interaction states — float labels, expanding search, password strength, OTP, validation, shake, range, step indicator, async submit.

categories.label: Image Effects
categories.description: Image-level animations — hover zoom, Ken Burns, blur to focus, color drain, mask reveal, tilt, scan line, glitch, lightbox, frame reveal.

categories.label: AI / Chat UI
categories.description: AI and chat UI primitives — streaming dots, streaming text, chat bubbles, thinking shimmer, prompt composer, citations, token counter, model selector.

categories.label: Drag & Drop
categories.description: Drag and drop interactions — drop zones, file cards, sortable lists, drop indicators, trash zones, drag previews, multi-file uploads, reorder grids.

categories.label: Command Palette
categories.description: Command palette UIs — Cmd-K trigger, spotlight, result items, group headers, no-results state, recent items, footer hints, match highlight.

categories.label: Theme Toggle
categories.description: Light/dark theme switchers — sun-moon morph, switch, circle reveal, three-state, color schemes, dropdown, system indicator.

categories.label: Hero Sections
categories.description: Above-the-fold hero patterns — centered, split, mesh gradient, word reveal, stat row, avatar stack, floating cards, newsletter, scroll indicator.

categories.label: Pricing Tables
categories.description: Pricing table animations — card hover, popular tier highlight, billing toggle, price morph, feature list, savings badge, comparison rows, discount countdowns.

categories.label: Video Player UI
categories.description: Custom video player UI — play-pause morph, scrubber, volume, buffer indicator, big play button, controls reveal, speed selector, captions toggle.

categories.label: Onboarding & Coachmarks
categories.description: Onboarding and coachmark patterns — spotlight, tour tooltip, step counter, welcome modal, feature pulse, coach arrow, skip button, confetti finale, checklist.

categories.label: Code & Terminal
categories.description: Code and terminal UI — terminal cursor, typing code, copy button, file tree, tab bar, syntax reveal, error squiggle, run button, command output, diff highlight.

categories.label: Footers
categories.description: Site footer patterns — minimal, newsletter signup, mega grid, aurora glow, status pill, sticky cookie bar, marquee, big brand mark, social stack, back-to-top.

categories.label: Login & Auth
categories.description: Login, sign-up, and auth-flow components — sign-in card with float labels, OAuth buttons, OTP input, password reveal, magic link, strength meter, biometric prompt, verify email, loading button.

categories.label: Calendars & Date Pickers
categories.description: Calendar and date-picker primitives — mini calendar, date range, popover trigger, time wheel, activity heatmap, month switcher, event pill, day timeline, countdown pill, schedule card.

categories.label: Sidebars & Docks
categories.description: Sidebars, rails, and docks — collapsible sidebar, macOS-style dock, drawer slide, FAB action menu, vertical rail, workspace switcher, file tree, mobile bottom nav, hover-reveal, glass floating.

categories.label: Steppers & Wizards
categories.description: Multi-step flows and wizards — linear stepper, vertical stepper, progress wizard, numbered, onboarding carousel, wizard tabs, SVG trace connector, card slide, done step, step pill indicator.

categories.label: Search & Autocomplete
categories.description: Search inputs and autocomplete primitives — expanding search, autocomplete dropdown, match highlight, recent searches, voice search, search loading, no-results state, Cmd-K trigger, clearable input, filter chips, type-ahead, async shimmer, spotlight modal, sticky search header, staggered results, search history pills.

categories.label: Sliders & Ranges
categories.description: Slider and range controls — single-value, dual-handle range, value bubble, vertical, stepped with ticks, animated gradient fill, histogram range, snap-to-step, hue picker, rotary knob, brightness slider, price range, slider + number input, drag-active thumb halo, curve preview, frequency bars.

categories.label: Audio & Waveforms
categories.description: Audio player UI and waveform visualizers — equalizer bars, voice activity meter, soundwave pulse, waveform scrubber, vinyl record spin, mic recording, circular visualizer, now-playing card, amplitude rings, play/pause morph, mute toggle, loop indicator, spectrum analyzer, track progress with waveform, audio buffering.

categories.label: Color Pickers
categories.description: Color selection primitives for design tools, theme builders and dashboards — swatch grid, gradient picker, hue ring, eye-dropper trigger, hex input, palette generator, recents, contrast pair with AA/AAA badges, color chip with copy, saturation/lightness sliders.

categories.label: Galleries & Carousels
categories.description: Image gallery and carousel patterns — horizontal carousel with dots, swipe indicator, lightbox open, thumbnail strip, masonry hover lift, 3D image fan, before/after comparison slider, polaroid stack, hover zoom with caption reveal, filter morph tabs.

categories.label: Maps & Locations
categories.description: Map and location UI — pin drop bounce, marker pulse, route trace, distance line with chip, geo-locating spinner, cluster expand, popup card, location search with use-my-location, compass needle, mini-map with viewport.

categories.label: Watch Faces & Clocks
categories.description: Clock and watch face designs — analog clock, digital readout, flip clock, pomodoro ring, stopwatch, world clock card, alarm bells, countdown ring, Swiss railway, military 24h, weather clock, day/night, sand hourglass, word clock, pulse heart, binary clock, sundial.

categories.label: Quotes & Testimonials
categories.description: Customer testimonial and pull-quote patterns — pull quote, testimonial card, star rating card, signature reveal, logo + quote strip, video testimonial, rating distribution, marquee testimonials, carousel, before/after, gradient border quote, animated stars, verified customer, masonry grid, spotlight quote, stat quote, floating card, inline quote link.

categories.label: Comments & Reactions
categories.description: Comment thread and reaction UI — comment thread, nested reply, emoji picker, emoji burst, like button heart, dislike thumb, share, reply input expand, mentions chip, reaction count badge, reaction bar, comment skeleton, pinned comment, highlighted reply, reaction stack, thumbs up counter, quote reply, emoji hover preview.

categories.label: Profile Headers
categories.description: User profile header patterns — bio card, banner + avatar, stat row, social links bar, edit profile button, level XP ring, verified checkmark, status presence, follow button toggle, follower count tick-up, pronouns pill, compact profile pill, skeleton loader, hero profile, member since badge, achievements strip, hover card, bio reveal.

categories.label: Settings & Preferences
categories.description: Settings and preferences UI — preference row toggle, settings card group, theme selector, notification preferences, account section, danger zone, save indicator, search settings input, two-column setting, accessibility section, connected apps, plan tier card, email verification, language picker, time zone picker, privacy row, sound preferences, reset to defaults.

categories.label: File Upload
categories.description: File upload lifecycle UI — drop zone idle and active states, file list item, upload progress bar, file type icons, image thumbnail preview, error state, multi-file count pill, file size pill, success checkmark, cancel upload, total progress, validation error, click-to-browse, paste hint, upload queue, file replaced, empty state.

categories.label: Tags & Chips Input
categories.description: Interactive tag/chip INPUT — users type to add chips and click to remove them: chip input add, remove animation, autocomplete dropdown, max-count, multi-select combobox, removable filter chips, drag reorder, validation. For read-only display badges, see Badges & Tags.

categories.label: Mobile Patterns
categories.description: Mobile-first interaction patterns — bottom sheet, pull-to-refresh, swipe-to-delete, action sheet, segmented control, mobile tab bar, FAB, ripple touch, momentum scroll, swipe card, status bar, top toast, long-press menu, drawer hamburger, pull-down search, mobile modal, onboarding dots, pinch-to-zoom hint.

categories.label: Notification Center
categories.description: Persistent notification inbox — the panel of past notifications behind a bell icon: notification item, inbox header with count, time-group separator, filter tabs, swipe-to-dismiss, inbox-zero empty state, bulk actions, mention, bell with badge. For transient pop-up toasts, see Toasts & Alerts.

categories.label: Tables & Data Grids
categories.description: Tables and data grids — striped, sortable and sticky headers, selectable and expandable rows, status pills, dense layouts, inline-edit cells, toolbars, footer totals, empty and loading states. Pure CSS, framework-agnostic.

categories.label: KPI & Dashboard Widgets
categories.description: KPI and dashboard widgets — stat cards with trend deltas, sparklines, progress rings, big-number tiles, goal bars, donut and gauge metrics, live counters, uptime tiles. Drop-in dashboard building blocks.

categories.label: Timelines
categories.description: Timelines — vertical, horizontal, alternating, activity feeds, roadmaps, git-commit style, numbered milestones, animated draw-in lines. For histories, changelogs, processes, and event sequences.

categories.label: Cookie & Consent
categories.description: Cookie and consent UI — bottom bars, corner cards, centered modals, slide-up banners, granular toggle panels, accept/reject and GDPR settings. Privacy notices that don't wreck the page.

categories.label: Error & 404 Pages
categories.description: Error and 404 pages — centered 404, 500 server error, glitch text, maintenance mode, offline state, empty-search, access-denied 403, retry cards. Friendly dead-ends that keep users oriented.

categories.label: Social Share
categories.description: Social share UI — horizontal rows, floating bars, copy-link pills, share counts, popover menus, native-style sheets, QR cards, like/share/bookmark bars. Inline-SVG glyphs, no external scripts.
